name: Pro Football
short_description: Relive the thrill of football management with Pro Football! Inspired by the classic football managers from 90's, this title invites you to dive into the exciting world of football. A masterpiece of strategy and sports management that challenges your ability to lead your team to glory.
detailed_description:
⚽ Relive the thrill of football management with Pro Football! 🏆

Inspired by the classic football managers from the 90's, this title invites you to dive into the exciting world of football. A masterpiece of strategy and sports management that challenges your ability to lead your team to glory.

Key Features:

  • Deep Team Management:
    Take full control of your club's strategy, finances, and development.

  • No Licenses, No Limits:
    Forget licensing restrictions with our database of randomized players and teams, ensuring a unique experience every time you play.

  • Extreme Customization:
    Load external databases to further personalize your gaming experience, with the option to include player and club names of your choice.

🎮 Dive into Pro Football and lead your team to the top of world football.
Do you have what it takes to be a legend? 🌟

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain*, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Catalan, French, German, Polish, Basque, Dutch, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
